roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED

/CAL:ADP MOTION TO MODIFY PROBATION RE VICTIM RESTITUTION/MO GRTD/PROB MOD/DEF:TO PAY VICTIM RESTITUTION TO DEBORAH VARICE IN THE SUM OF $634,00/X:DEFENSE ORAL MOTION TO REDUCE COUNT 2 TO A MISDEMEANOR IS GRANTED,/X:COUNT2 IS REDUCED TO A MISDEMEANOR PURSUANT TO PC 17(B),/X:VIF IS REDUCED TO $150/CTORD:FORMAL PROBATION CONVERTED TO COURT PROBATION/X:ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION CR-110 SIGNED AND FILED,/X:ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT CR-111 SIGNED AND FILED,/

/CAL:SENTENCING/AJW/CH2:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 38 D/CTS:38/DNA/WS/WEAP/CTORD:THAT AFTER TWO (2) YEARS OF SUCCESSFUL PROBATION, DEFENDANT'S  FORMAL PROBATION MAY BE REDUCED TO COURT PROBATION/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENDANT MUST ABIDE BYSTAY-AWAY ORDER (FILED ON 10-30-13): STAY OUT OF FIRST REPUBLIC BANK AT 1EMBARCADERO STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA;  STAY OUT OF FIRST REPUBLIC BANK AT653 IRVING STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA; STAY OUT OF FIRST REPUBLIC BANK AT 2001 VAN NESS AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA,/RESTV/VF4:280/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/DISM3/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/SA2: STAY OUT OF FIRST REPUBLIC BANK AT 1 EMBARCADERO STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SA3:STAY OUT OFFIRST REPUBLIC BANK AT 653 IRVING STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SA3:STAY OUT OF FIRST REPUBLIC BANK AT 2001 VAN NESS AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD/ARBUCKLE/PRES:11-21-13/CONTD:SENTENCING ON 11-21-13/DOP/
/CAL: SPR  ELIGIBILITY REPORT/X:THE DEFENDANT IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR RELEASEON  SPR /VD:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 10-31-13 IS VACATED/CONTD:TO SETPRELIMINARY HEARING/NTW/LD:11-01-13/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/CONTD:FOR SPR ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/LD: FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS11-01-13/BAIL:100000/SA1:LAURETTE HARTIGAN/SAORD/SA2:FIRST REPUBLIC BANKLOCATED AT 2001 VAN NESS AVE,, SF,CA/SAORD/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
